topic: percent of a whole, reading tables
latex:
The Quill and Scroll is a stationery shop. Its stock and sales for May are listed in the table shown. What percent of its sales were not pens or pencils?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Item} & \textbf{\% of May Sales} \\
\hline
Pens & 38 \\
\hline
Pencils & 35 \\
\hline
Other & ? \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
